display_text: Tier 2: Mana Draught. Neutral consumable that restores 70 mana plus 3% of the user's max mana over 6 seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan during the channel, the effect is lost. Can be cast on allies by holding Control. Stats: CD: 60s, Duration: 6s, Base Heal: 70 Mana, Percentage Heal: 3% Max Mana.
search_text: neutral mana consumable, mana regen neutral, team mana potion, mana flask, share mana, mana restore, neutral tier 2, mana sustain, bottle alternative, mana draught, consumable mana
